WENG Shih-liang'( chairman of the South China Democratic League was a former Divisional Commander in the Kreaag- Lung Armye  He is an old associate of General TSAI Ting kai. 2.      WEG left Shantung i'rovince Comiunist Headquarters on 26 September 1946 for shanghai where he stopped for three days before continuing his journey to Hongkong. Enroute he stopped at Swatow for two days. Upon arrival at Hongkong, itiENG spent the evening at the offices of the Hua Shang Pao (   (~ ), Coamnunist daily.  The following morning, he left for Uuiyang (114-26, 23-05).  He is believed to be on an inspection tour, and to be supervising the distribution of funds to various Communist organizations in South China. Document No
